raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nogahje/ un suhtija pee
Josawata to Kehntan no Juh-
da/ tazzidams: Tas Moabite-
ru Kehntnsch irr no mannim at-
kahpees/ gribbi tu ar mannim
prett Moabu Karrā cet? Un tas
fazzija: Es eefchu/ es buhſchu
tā ka tu/ manni Landis ta ka
tawi Landis/ un manni Sirgi
tā ka tawi Sirgt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija: Pa ku-
ru Zettu mehs eefun? un wiꞥſch
fazzija : Pa to Eedomitern
Lukfnetes Zettu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tā nogahje tas Israēta
Kehninsch/ un tas Kehninsch no
Juhda/ un tas Eedomiteru Keh-
ninsch. Un kad tee feptinas Dee-
nas bija apkahrt gahjuſcht/ tad
teem ne bija Uhdens preeſch ta
Karrā-Spehka/ neds preeſch
Lohpeem/ ko tee pee fewis tur-
reja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazztja tas Israēta
Kehninsch: Waj! ka tas KUNGS
ſchohs trihs Kehninus irr aizi-
najs/ ka wiꞥſch tohs to Moabi-
teru Rohkā dohtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Josawats fazztja:
Woj ſche ne irr weens Praweets
ta KUNga/ ka mehs to KUNGU
zaur winnu waizajam? tad at-
bildeja tam weens no ta Israēta
Kehnixa Kalpeem/ un fazzija :
Scheitan irr Elisus Sawata
Dehls/ kas Uhdent us Elijafa
Rohkahin lehje.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Josawats fazzija:
Ta KUNGA Wahrs irr pee
winna. Ta nogahje pee ta tas
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Israēta Kehninsch/ un Josa-
wats/ un tas Eedomiteru Keh-
ninsch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Elisus fazztja us
Israēta Kehnixu: Kaß man ar
tew Darba? Eij tu pee tawa
Tehwa Praiveefscheem/ un pee
tawas Mahtes Praiveefscheem.
Bet tas IsraētaKehninsch fazz-
ija us teem: Ne/ jo tas KUNGS
irr ſchohs trihs Kehninus aizi-
najs/ ka wiꞥſch tohs teem Moa-
biteruin Rohkā dohtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Elisus fazzija: Tie
teeschain ka tas KUNGS zeba-
atsdsihwo/preeſsch ka es stahwu/
ja es to Josawata ta Kehnina
no Juhda labbad ne darritu/ es
tew ne gribbetu neds usluhkoht/
neds zeeniht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad/ dabbujeet man
weenu Kohfletaju. Un kad tas
Kohfletajs us tahm Stihgahm
speheja/ tad nahze ta KUNGA
Rohka pahr winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija : Ta-
jakka tas KUNGS: Darraje
dauds Grabwuis pee ſchaſs
Uppes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Juhs ne redsefeet Wehju nedā
Leetus/ tatſchn taps ſchi Uppe
ar Uhdent pildita/ ka juhs dser-
at ar fatweem tihkeem un leelein
Lohpeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir tas irr mas preeſsch ta
KUNGA/ wiꞥſch dohs arri tohs
Moabiterus juhsu Rohkā/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un jums buhs wiſſus
ſtiprus Pilſtahtus/ un wiſſus
Xrrr
isweh-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
